summary: Comprehensive testing of reorganized Sales Dashboard with new business analytics structure completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI sections working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend API - All 11 endpoints (100% success rate)
Executive Summary - All 7 KPI cards displaying correctly
Price Margin Analysis - All 3 cards showing 5% commission data
SPIFF Commission Breakdown - Total and brand structure working
Sales Analysis - Unit Type charts rendering properly
Performance Trends - Deal Status and Monthly Revenue charts working
Detailed Records - Complete table with all 8 columns
Update Data button - Functional with SharePoint integration
Backend API new features - price_margin_total, price_margin_sales_count, price_margin_commission
Backend API SPIFF features - spiff_total and spiff_breakdown with brand data
Dashboard data refresh from SharePoint Excel

success_percentage.frontend: 98% - All 6 sections working, only minor note on SPIFF brands
